description: Beyond the Veil Patch 7 (29 March 2023) — Changes and Improvements, Combat Balance Changes (Spears, Helmets, Armors, Battlemount Abilities, Battlemount Max Health, Miscellaneous), Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes and Improvements
items: "Select / Unselect All" button added to "Loadouts" section of Marketplace UI
Streamlined and improved guild logo creation
Added item icons to tooltips of harvestables
[Desktop] Minimap can now be collapsed and re-expanded in main HUD
[Mobile] Map tooltips now offset from point of touch
[Albion East] System-provided Carrot Soups and Mules removed from Marketplaces
[Referrals] Referral seasons are now one month long (previously two) and may include older skins
sections.searchable_text: Changes Improvements Loadouts Marketplace Select Unselect All guild logo item icons tooltips harvestables Desktop Minimap Mobile Map Albion East Carrot Soups Mules Referrals seasons one month skins

subsections.heading: Spears
subsections.searchable_text: Spears Breakthrough Daybreaker purges before dealing damage

changes.raw_text: Breakthrough (Daybreaker): Now purges before dealing damage

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Hyper Focus Feyscale Hat Buff Duration 5s 7s immunity Cast Disruption channel

changes.raw_text: Hyper Focus (Feyscale Hat): Buff Duration: 5s → 7s; Gives immunity to Cast Disruption (channel or cast durations being affected by damage)
notes: Gives immunity to Cast Disruption (i.e. channel or cast durations being affected by damage)

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Dynamic Defense Jacket of Tenacity cast on self

changes.raw_text: Dynamic Defense (Jacket of Tenacity): Can now be cast on self
notes: Can now be cast on self

subsections.heading: Battlemount Abilities
subsections.searchable_text: Battlemount Abilities Pierce Through Siege Ballista Cast Time 2s 0.5s Artillery Fire Behemoth Max Stack 3 5 DoT Damage Players per stack 10% 8% Flamboyant Defense purges direct damage Oil Flame Charge Smokescreen dissolves 30m radius

changes.raw_text: Artillery Fire (Behemoth): Max Stack: 3 → 5; DoT Damage vs Players per stack: 10% → 8%

stats.name: DoT Damage vs Players per stack

changes.raw_text: Flamboyant Defense (Behemoth): No longer purges or applies direct damage; Applies an Oil Flame Charge to each enemy hit
notes: No longer purges or applies direct damage
Applies an Oil Flame Charge to each enemy hit

changes.raw_text: Smokescreen (Behemoth): Casting now dissolves all ally Smokescreen areas in a 30m radius
notes: Casting now dissolves all ally Smokescreen areas in a 30m radius

notes: Health Regen adjusted to remain 10% Max Health per second

subsections.heading: Miscellaneous
subsections.searchable_text: Miscellaneous 2v2 Hellgates Healing Reduction 20% 30% Mists Solo Greater Healing Reduction 20% 30%

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Adjusted Mists local maps so that exits are always visible
Fixed issue where party order would reset on zone change and party roles would not update for new members
Fixed rare issue where laborer rewards could disappear when clicking away too quickly
Rejuvenating Flower (Nature Staff) is no longer destroyed by enemies walking over it
Nature Staff spells that apply multiple Rejuvenation Stacks simultaneously now only trigger the initial heal once (Rejuvenating Flower, Rejuvenating Breeze)
Fixed issue where Sandstorm (Bridgewatch Cape) could activate twice with high attack speeds
Whirling Strike and Gale Dance (Quarterstaff) now apply cooldown reduction buff when first hit misses or third hit kills target
Resolved issues affecting the Fishing minigame on devices with low performance
Fixed issue where getting disconnected for too long in Arena could trigger overburdened debuff
Fixed issue where, when catching fish with full inventory, loot bag would be dropped in the water
Lymhurst Direboar Piglets are no longer vegetarian
The Poison area debuff in Veteran Hidden Keeps no longer lasts 60 minutes and now falls off when leaving the area
[Mobile] Fixed issue where aiming a spell's direction while channeling could be unresponsive
[Mobile] Fixed issue where characters could be moved when they should be blocked by UI
[Mobile] Divine Intervention (Hallowfall) now targets allies instead of enemies on mobile
Additional graphical, UI, animation, audio, terrain, and localization fixes
